feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: INC44943891 - SWP - Rebate condition records need to remove in KOTE530
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Issue is with the rebate conditions maintained for the Agreement 14241, Business User has wrongly maintained the Rebate condition records for Sales Office - 31YG, Customer - ZD158875 and Selling reporting code.

Now we want to remove these condition records from the system, please guide us how to remove these conditions permanently from the Table KOTE530.

Could you please guide us how to remove these condition records.

Regards,

Syamkiran K

entry.title: Do you think your current ERP setup supports or limits your AI initiatives?
entry.content: I feel like ERP can either really help or quietly get in the way of AI. Curious how it’s working for you.

entry.title: At what point does ERP complexity start affecting business performance?
entry.content: At some point ERP complexity just starts slowing everything down… wondering when that usually hits for others.

entry.title: What’s actually working when communicating SAP Business AI value to clients?
entry.content: I feel like a lot of the AI talk sounds good in theory, but in real conversations it doesn’t always land the same way. In your experience, what parts of SAP Business AI do clients actually understand or get interested in right away? And what usually needs more explaining or just doesn’t click at all?

entry.title: Do you think your current ERP setup supports or limits your AI initiatives?
entry.content: Does your ERP actually help when you try to do something with AI, or does it end up getting in the way?

entry.title: Activate the “No Rolling” flag in T-code SNRO for object RV_BELEG
entry.content: We are trying to activate the “No Rolling” flag in T-code SNRO for object RV_BELEG using client A1 and a transport request. However, we are unable to activate the flag. Kindly assist us with how to proceed with this activity.

entry.title: Unable to activate the “No Rolling” flag in T-code SNRO for object RV_BELEG
entry.content: We are trying to activate the “No Rolling” flag in T-code SNRO for object RV_BELEG using client A1 and a transport request. However, we are unable to activate the flag. Kindly assist us with how to proceed with this activity.

entry.title: Get BUT000 data in BDT Event DSAVB
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm using the Business Data Toolset (BDT) for BP to set a specific value in one field of BUT000 table when a specific BP Grouping is used.
I implemented this logic in a custom function module and linked it to the event DSAVB.
Because the function module is not included into the standard environment I need to read the current BUT000 work area.
I tried to use the function BUP_BUPA_BUT000_GET, but its usage generates an infinite loop, because it, in turns , calls the event DSAVB.
I know that there is still the old fashioned way to pull the BUT000 value looking at the calling stack level, but I'm wondering if there is a more modern way to accomplish the task.

Thanks,
Antonino

entry.title: At what point does ERP complexity start affecting business performance?
entry.content: When does ERP complexity stop being manageable and start becoming a real problem for the business? When do you actually start feeling it in daily operations, like things getting slower or more annoying than they should be?

entry.title: S/4HANA AIF enhancement for Order to Cash
entry.content: In the Exisiting S4HANA system we have custom order type flow happen for Order type ZXX but for one region the existing SAP API does not support the required order type ZXXX. This limitation blocks order creation and directly impacts touchless ordering adoption in the affected sales areas. how do we enable the use of the by allowing the order type to be converted to ZXXX via AIF during order creation. from web order flow and SAP boundary (AIF) --> Intercept CREATE only? Please throw some details to implement the same.

entry.title: Inter company IC billing not getting created
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are facing an issue, while trying to create IC billing with refer to required delivery.

Getting error as '' Sales organization is not defined''. We have attached the error screenshots.

Kindly check and help us with the solution of the issue.

entry.title: PR Item Valuation Price missing after change Val. Type in ME52N
entry.content:
Valuation Price in PR always disappears when I enter the Valuation Type (ME52N) in the PR item, even though the item already has an info record. Is there any configuration that could help resolve this issue? 

Before enter Val. type

After enter Val. type (ME52N)

entry.title: Customer - General Data - Export: CIVVE field ECC exists, while S4 does not exist.
entry.content: Customer - General Data - Export: CIVVE field ECC exists, while S4 does not exist.

entry.title: MD4C Report
entry.content:
Hello SAP Support Team,

 

We have a problem with the MD4C report. After activating the LOG_PP_MIS business function, the icon for delays is missing from the layout.

Is there a way to restore this icon? Was it perhaps renamed or replaced by another function?

The documentation for the business function says that more information is available in MD4C, so I assume that there is at least one alternative to the icon delay.

 

Thank you in advance.

Best Regrads

entry.title: MEIS T-code taking non Material PO in report.
entry.content:
MEIS T-code taking non Material PO in report. Is there alternative report which will run for Material number PO's.

MEIS  report fetch PO with non material number where the TARE weight is 0.00.

Expecting alternative report to display Material PO where the Tare weight is more than 1KG.

entry.title: New asset created but depreciation is calculated for longer period
entry.content:
Hi,

Business created a new cloud computing asset: FA 1000024 CLM – Implementation Cost for LinkSquares. The contract term is 12/19/2025–12/18/2026, and the implementation invoice was paid in April. Business attempted to place the asset in service for 8 months so depreciation would run from May through December. However, the system is calculating depreciation over 12 months. Could someone please help adjust the depreciation schedule so it ends in December (when the contract term ends)?

I will share screenshots in the document attached. The issue is in NEP system. 

 

Regards

Kriti Palod

entry.title: 资产以前年度多折旧了，怎么冲回？
entry.content:
资产701001854，2024年资产的摊销已完成，与实际情况不符，如何处理实现把以前年度多摊销的金额冲回？

SAP版本ECC770

entry.title: Company code 6151 is not permitted as the paying company code in FBZP Config.
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We have developed a new company code, Q951, with reference to coco 6151 as part of a rollout project in Switzerland. We are establishing a cross-company agreement wherein the bank account in 6151 makes payments on behalf of Q951 in accordance with business requirements. For the new Coco Q951, the paying company code will be 6151. However, please be note that although both coco are from Switzerland, their functional currency is different. The currency in Coco 6151 is CHF.The currency of Coco Q951 is USD.

 

Problem: When customizing in the FBZP transaction, error F3063 occurs. After reading OSS note 2257645, we now know that in order to establish cross-company payments, both COCOs must be located in the same country and bearing the same functional currency.

 

Why this ticket: We simply wanted to know if there was another way to get around this problem and develop the cross-company payment system properly. Alternatively, if this is an unchangeable SAP standard practice.

entry.title: DMEE Transaction
entry.content:
Hello Team,

This is regarding the issue where the user needs to populate both IBAN and Bank Account values in the DMEE transaction.

Specifically, in the path:
DMEE → PmtInf → CdtTrfTxInf → CdtrAcct → Other → Id

  • The IBAN value should be populated under Other → Id (when available)
  • The Vendor Bank Account should be populated under Other → Id (if IBAN is not maintained)

However, despite trying multiple conditions as per the below configurations, we are observing that the IBAN value is still populating in the IBAN field and the Bank Account in (Other → Id), instead of correctly populating both fields as required.

Could you please assist us in guiding on how to correctly populate:

  • IBAN in the Other → Id
  • Vendor Bank Account in the Other → Id field (when IBAN is not available)

Thanks

Pooja

entry.title: use agentic ai for streamserve application
entry.content:
We would like to explore potential use cases for leveraging Agentic AI within OpenText Exstream and understand how this capability can enhance our document generation and customer communication processes.
 
We would appreciate it if you could:
Share relevant use cases where Agentic AI has been successfully implemented in OpenText Exstream or similar CCM platforms. 

Provide any available documentation, reference architectures, or best practices that can help us evaluate and design these solutions
Highlight potential integration approaches and limitations, if any.

This will help us assess feasibility and identify opportunities for further exploration and implementation.
